zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Bosworth於1619年出生在英國林可爾史爾波斯頓時，她的父親Hanniel Bosworth29歲，母親Abigail Scott29歲。她於1645年之前與Theophilus Shatswell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1672年5月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾享年53歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Bosworth于1619年出生在英国林可爾史爾波斯頓时，她的父亲Hanniel Bosworth29岁，母亲Abigail Scott29岁。她于1645年之前与Theophilus Shatswell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1672年5月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾享年53岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可哈維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bosworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Husbands Bosworth in Leicestershire (Baresworde in Domesday Book) from an Old English personal name, Bār (from bār ‘boar’) + worth ‘enclosure’, and possibly also from Market Bosworth in Leicestershire, so named with an Old English personal name Bōsa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Bosworth was born in 1619, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Hanniel Bosworth, was 29 and her mother, Abigail Scott, was 29. She married Theophilus Shatswell before 1645, in Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 3 May 1672, in Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 53, and was buried in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Bosworth est née en 1619, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Hanniel Bosworth, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Abigail Scott, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Theophilus Shatswell avant 1645, à Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1672, à Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susanna Bosworth 1619 in Boston, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hanniel Bosworth 29 und ihre Mutter Abigail Scott 29. Sie hat vor 1645 in Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Theophilus Shatswell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1672 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Bosworth è nata il nel 1619 nel Boston, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Hanniel Bosworth, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Abigail Scott, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Theophilus Shatswell prima del 1645, nel Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 3 maggio 1672, nel Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Bosworthが1619年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで生まれた時，父Hanniel Bosworthは29歳，母Abigail Scottは29歳であった。1645年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクヘイバーヒルでTheophilus Shatswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1672年5月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクヘイバーヒルで53歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐
ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 하버힐
ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Bosworth(이)가 1619년 영국 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hanniel Bosworth(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Scott(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1645년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 하버힐에서 Theophilus Shatswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1672년 5월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 하버힐에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Bosworth nasceu em 1619, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hanniel Bosworth, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Scott, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Theophilus Shatswell antes 1645, em Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1672, em Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Bosworth родилась в 1619 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hanniel Bosworth было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Scott, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theophilus Shatswell перед 1645 г. в местности хавирилл, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 мая 1672 г. в местности хавирилл, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности хавирилл, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna Bosworth nació en 1619, en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hanniel Bosworth, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Abigail Scott, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Theophilus Shatswell antes de 1645, en Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1672, en Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Haverhill, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
